column1: Your query : (ALL(( ( "Higher education" OR "Universit*" ) AND ( "Student*" OR "Undergraduat*" ) ) AND ( "Academic dashboard" OR "Educational data mining" OR "Learning analytic*" OR "Student profiling" OR "Automated monitoring" OR "Automated tracking" OR "Performance mapping" ) AND ( "Traditional method*" OR "Conventional monitoring" OR "Manual assessment" OR "Manual tracking" ) AND ( "Academic achievement" OR "Dropout" OR "Retention" OR "Student success" OR "Decision support system*" OR "Dropout forecasting" OR "Early warning system*" OR "Risk assessment" OR "Privacy concern*" OR "Barrier*" OR "Challenge*" )) AND PUBYEAR > 2020 AND PUBYEAR < 2027 AND ( LIMIT-TO ( SUBJAREA,"COMP" ) )  AND ( LIMIT-TO ( DOCTYPE,"ar" ) OR LIMIT-TO ( DOCTYPE,"cp" ) )  AND ( LIMIT-TO ( LANGUAGE,"English" ) ) )
